answers: Baking basics: measure precisely (baking is chemistry!), preheat oven, use room-temp ingredients, and don't overmix.
Start baking: begin with simple recipes — banana bread, cookies, muffins. Invest in measuring cups, mixing bowls, and a good oven thermometer.
Cake tips: cream butter and sugar well, alternate dry and wet ingredients, don't open oven door early, and test with toothpick.
Baking essentials: flour, sugar, butter, eggs, baking powder/soda, vanilla extract. With these you can make almost anything!
